title: Financial institution discloses too much information in response to production order
summary: The complainant made a request to access his personal information and discovered his financial institution had provided police with what he believed to be too much information in response to production orders, specifically information regarding his RESP account dating back to 1999. We found the documents were outside the scope of the rele...
